message:
feat(iconv): implement phase-1 character encoding conversion engine

Implement a complete iconv subsystem supporting UTF-8, ISO-8859-1/Latin1,
and UTF-16LE encoding conversions. This replaces the previous stub
("Implementation pending Phase 4") with a fully functional engine that
provides deterministic POSIX-compliant error semantics.

Core engine (glibc-rs-core/src/iconv/mod.rs):
- Add Encoding enum with UTF-8, Latin1, UTF-16LE variants
- Add IconvDescriptor carrying from/to encoding pair
- Add IconvResult (non_reversible, in_consumed, out_written) and
  IconvError (code, in_consumed, out_written) for progress tracking
- Implement encoding name parser with normalization (strips hyphens,
  underscores, spaces; case-insensitive)
- Implement per-encoding decode functions with proper incomplete/invalid
  multibyte sequence detection (2/3/4-byte UTF-8, overlong rejection,
  surrogate rejection)
- Implement per-encoding encode functions with output buffer capacity
  checks and unrepresentable codepoint detection (Latin1 > 0xFF)
- Implement iconv_convert main loop: decode -> transcode -> encode with
  deterministic error codes (E2BIG=7, EILSEQ=84, EINVAL=22)
- All 9 encoding pairs supported (3x3 matrix)

ABI layer (glibc-rs-abi/src/iconv_abi.rs):
- Implement iconv_open: validates encoding names, allocates boxed
  descriptor, registers handle in global HashSet for validity tracking
- Implement iconv: POSIX-compliant conversion with pointer/length
  advancement, reset-path handling (null inbuf), EBADF for invalid
  handles, membrane runtime policy gating
- Implement iconv_close: validates handle, deallocates descriptor,
  unregisters from handle set
- All functions set errno via __errno_location for C ABI compatibility

Test fixtures:
- Add tests/conformance/fixtures/iconv_phase1.json with encoding pair
  test vectors covering ASCII, multibyte, Latin1 special chars, and
  error conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,105 @@
+{
+  "version": "v1",
+  "family": "iconv/phase1",
+  "captured_at": "2026-02-11T00:00:00Z",
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "strict_utf8_to_utf16le_basic",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-16LE",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-8",
+        "input": [65, 66],
+        "out_len": 8
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ok nonrev=0 in_left=0 out_left=4 out=[65, 0, 66, 0]",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "strict_latin1_to_utf8_multibyte",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-8",
+        "fromcode": "ISO-8859-1",
+        "input": [72, 233],
+        "out_len": 4
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ok nonrev=0 in_left=0 out_left=1 out=[72, 195, 169]",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "strict_e2big_preserves_progress",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-16LE",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-8",
+        "input": [65, 66],
+        "out_len": 3
+      },
+      "expected_output": "err errno=7 in_left=1 out_left=1 out=[65, 0]",
+      "expected_errno": 7,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "strict_eilseq_invalid_utf8",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-16LE",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-8",
+        "input": [195, 40],
+        "out_len": 8
+      },
+      "expected_output": "err errno=84 in_left=2 out_left=8 out=[]",
+      "expected_errno": 84,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "strict_einval_incomplete_utf8",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-16LE",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-8",
+        "input": [226, 130],
+        "out_len": 8
+      },
+      "expected_output": "err errno=22 in_left=2 out_left=8 out=[]",
+      "expected_errno": 22,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "strict_unsupported_encoding",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "POSIX iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-32",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-8",
+        "input": [65],
+        "out_len": 8
+      },
+      "expected_output": "open_err errno=22",
+      "expected_errno": 22,
+      "mode": "strict"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "hardened_utf16le_to_utf8",
+      "function": "iconv",
+      "spec_section": "TSM hardened iconv",
+      "inputs": {
+        "tocode": "UTF-8",
+        "fromcode": "UTF-16LE",
+        "input": [172, 32],
+        "out_len": 4
+      },
+      "expected_output": "ok nonrev=0 in_left=0 out_left=1 out=[226, 130, 172]",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "hardened"
+    }
+  ]
+}
